description: A general-purpose agent capable of handling coding tasks and real-time web research. Unlike static LLM agents, this agent can search the internet for current information and execute Python code to verify correctness before returning results.
use_cases: Searching the web for current information
Answering questions that require up-to-date knowledge
limitations: Web search limited to 5 results per query by default
Text only — no image, audio, or video input
Code execution runs in a subprocess sandbox on the host machine

capabilities.description: Writes, executes, and verifies Python code based on natural language descriptions.
capabilities.input_example: Write a Python function that sorts a list of dictionaries by a given key.
capabilities.output_example: A working, tested Python function with execution output confirming correctness.
capabilities.constraints: Code execution is sandboxed with a 15 second timeout. Only Python is supported.

capabilities.description: Searches the internet for current information and synthesizes results.
capabilities.input_example: What are the latest developments in AI agent frameworks in 2026?
capabilities.output_example: A synthesized summary of recent developments based on live web search results.
capabilities.constraints: Search depth is basic. Results limited to 5 per query.

capabilities.description: Performs multi-step reasoning combining web search and code execution as needed.
capabilities.input_example: Find the current price of NVIDIA stock and calculate what a $1000 investment would be worth today if bought at $100.
capabilities.output_example: A step-by-step solution using search for current price and code for calculation.
capabilities.constraints: Accuracy depends on search result quality and recency.

network.notes: Outbound to local vLLM instance on port 8050 and Tavily search API.

filesystem.notes: Writes temporary Python files to /tmp for code execution, deleted after run.

logging.notes: Tool calls logged per invocation via stdout. No user data retained.

tests.name: smoke_test_code_generation
tests.description: POST /invoke with a coding task and verify working code with execution output is returned.

tests.name: smoke_test_web_search
tests.description: POST /invoke with a current events question and verify a synthesized search-based answer is returned.

tests.name: smoke_test_combined
tests.description: POST /invoke with a task requiring both search and code execution and verify both tools are used.
